Localization.Description: A user logged in to GitLab or logged out of it

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to log in to GitLab on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} logged in to GitLab on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} is logging out of GitLab on host {event_src.host}
